name: Peanutty Chewy Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 can Sweetened condensed milk (14 oz. can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, granulated sugar, cocoa, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add butter; cut in with a pastry blender or hands until the mixture is well blended, resembling coarse crumbs.
5. Add eggs; mix well.
6. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pan, pressing firmly onto the bottom.
7. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until the mixture is set.
8. Remove from oven and sprinkle peanut butter chips on top.
9. Drizzle sweetened condensed milk evenly over the chips.
10. Top with coconut flakes.
11. Return to oven; bake for an additional 20 to 25 minutes, or until lightly browned on top.
12. Cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
13. Cut into bars. About 24 bars.
